raw_comment: As you can see more of the warm and south states saw the first leaves fall like Florida and Texas this makes sense because the warmer states see warmer weather than the northern states.
ace_sentences: Some warm states saw the first leaves fall.
Some south states saw the first leaves fall.
The warmer states see warmer weather than the northern states.

Some warm states saw the first leaves fa: the warm and south states saw the first leaves fall
Some south states saw the first leaves f: the warm and south states saw the first leaves fall
The warmer states see warmer weather tha: the warmer states see warmer weather than the northern states
